testcase.name: test_seo_page_specific_can_be_stored

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'About LEXA | TEST' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb342659c00>('title') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb342659c00> = {'key': 'seo_about', 'value': {'canonical_url': '', 'description': 'TEST about page description', 'keywords': 'about, lexa, test', 'og_description': 'TEST about OG description', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_c_seo_a11y.py:103: in test_seo_page_specific_can_be_stored assert data.get('title') == test_data['title'] E AssertionError: assert None == 'About LEXA | TEST' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb342659c00>('title') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb342659c00> = {'key': 'seo_about', 'value': {'canonical_url': '', 'description': 'TEST about page description', 'keywords': 'about, lexa, test', 'og_description': 'TEST about OG description', ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_seo_robots_directive_options

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'index, follow' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb3424d7300>('robots') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb3424d7300> = {'key': 'seo_test_robots', 'value': {'description': 'Testing robots directive', 'robots': 'index, follow', 'title': 'TEST Page with index, follow'}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_c_seo_a11y.py:134: in test_seo_robots_directive_options assert data.get('robots') == robots E AssertionError: assert None == 'index, follow' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb3424d7300>('robots') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb3424d7300> = {'key': 'seo_test_robots', 'value': {'description': 'Testing robots directive', 'robots': 'index, follow', 'title': 'TEST Page with index, follow'}}.get
